Also mention that at 30,000 ft, the air is too thin for breathing, and at 50,000 ft, it's essentially vacuum. Also mention that at 100,000 ft, it's space. Provide mention of the "high altitude" categories: moderate (2,500-3,500 m), high (3,500-5,500 m), very high (5,500-7,500 m), extreme (7,500-8,000 m), death zone (8,000-12,000 m). Provide mention of the "Mount Everest" altitude 8,848 m. Provide mention of the "death zone" above 8,000 m. Provide mention of the "Kármán line" at 100 km. Provide mention of the "International Space Station" at 400 km. Provide mention of the "atmosphere" extends to ~100 km. Provide mention of the "mesosphere" and "thermosphere".
